workspace.name: GoUltra AI
workspace.description: Social media content for GoUltra AI — the Human + AI content planning platform. Telling the story of why we built it, how it works, and how to get the most from it.

linkedin.notes: Primary platform — thought leadership, long-form storytelling. Target: founders, marketers, content teams.

instagram.notes: Visual-first. Carousels for education, Reels for demos and tips.

facebook.notes: Community engagement. Repurpose LinkedIn content with more casual tone.

youtube.notes: Shorts for quick tips and product demos. Long-form in YVP.

tones.name: Conversational
tones.description: Friendly, relatable, like talking to a smart friend

audiences.name: Content Creators & Marketers
audiences.description: Social media managers, content strategists, freelancers managing brand presence

audiences.name: Founders & Decision Makers
audiences.description: Startup founders, CMOs, agency owners evaluating content tools

audiences.name: AI-Curious Beginners
audiences.description: Want to use AI for content but overwhelmed by options and prompting

audiences.name: Agency Teams
audiences.description: Agencies managing multiple brands, need scalable workflows

audiences.name: Solo Entrepreneurs
audiences.description: Wearing all hats, need efficiency without sacrificing quality

image_styles.name: GoUltra Clean
image_styles.description: White/light backgrounds, blue accent, minimal, professional

image_styles.name: Dark Mode Premium
image_styles.description: Dark backgrounds with glowing accent colors, techy feel

image_styles.name: Flat Illustration
image_styles.description: Clean vector characters and icons, modern and friendly

image_styles.name: Screenshot + Overlay
image_styles.description: Product screenshots with branded overlay frames and callouts

image_styles.name: Split Comparison
image_styles.description: Before/after or vs. layouts for comparison content

image_styles.name: Infographic
image_styles.description: Data-heavy with charts, stats, and visual hierarchy

research_templates.name: Topic Ideation
research_templates.description: Generate diverse post ideas for a given topic
research_templates.prompt:
You are a social media strategist for GoUltra AI, a Human + AI content planning platform. Generate {count} creative, high-performing post ideas about: {topic}.

For each idea provide:
- title: working title
- angle: unique perspective
- hook: scroll-stopping first line
- type: image/carousel/video/text
- platforms: best platforms
- cta_suggestion: call to action
- reasoning: why this performs (2-3 sentences)
- suggested_tags: relevant tags

Target: {audience}
Tone: {tone}

{custom_instructions}

Respond ONLY as a JSON array.

research_templates.name: Competitor Gap Analysis
Content Pillar Expansion
research_templates.description: Expand a content pillar into post ideas

research_templates.name: Product Story Arc
research_templates.description: Map a multi-post narrative arc for a product story

colors.palette_description: Clean tech blue with dark navy depth and teal accent. Professional yet modern, never corporate-stuffy.

typography.body_style: Regular sans-serif, high readability, generous line height
typography.text_treatment: Minimal text on images — max 6-8 words per overlay. Large headings, small supporting text.

visual_style.overall_aesthetic: Clean tech-forward minimalism with depth. White space is our friend.
visual_style.photography_style: Not used often — prefer illustrations and UI screenshots
visual_style.illustration_style: Flat vector with subtle gradients, rounded corners, friendly characters when needed
visual_style.icon_style: Line icons 2px stroke in brand blue, consistent with app UI icons
visual_style.pattern_usage: Subtle dot grid or mesh gradient backgrounds, never busy patterns
visual_style.mood: Empowering, clear-headed, confident but not arrogant. Like a brilliant friend explaining something complex simply.

layout_rules.image_composition: Clean negative space, content left or center-aligned, never cluttered
layout_rules.carousel_consistency: Same header bar with GoUltra blue gradient, same font sizes, same padding across all slides
layout_rules.thumbnail_style: Bold text overlay on dark/gradient background, product UI peek, high contrast

img_001.description: GoUltra AI branded LinkedIn post template — blue gradient header, white body, clean typography
img_001.notes: Primary reference for all LinkedIn single image posts

img_002.description: Dark mode variant — navy background with teal accent glow, premium tech feel
img_002.notes: Use for contrarian/bold posts and product announcements

img_003.description: Carousel slide template — blue gradient top bar, white body, numbered sections
img_003.notes: Use as reference for ALL carousel slides to ensure visual consistency

img_004.description: YouTube Shorts thumbnail — dark gradient background, bold white text, UI screenshot peek
img_004.notes: High contrast for small mobile screens
